title: tetramicra parviflora
intro: Tetramicra parviflora, also known as the small-flowered Tetramicra, is a plant species within the Rubiaceae family. This plant is traditionally used in folk medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly for its anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Tetramicra parviflora include its potential to treat skin conditions, wounds, and respiratory issues, as well as its ability to reduce fever and alleviate pain. In herbal preparations, Tetramicra parviflora is often used in infusions, decoctions, and tinctures to harness its medicinal properties and provide relief from various health conditions.
